package rulecoverage

func PositiveSqlQueryConstantsOutsideRepositoryPackage() string {
    ruleID := "sql_query_constants_outside_repository_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Raw query templates stored in handlers, services, or DTO packages instead of repository-adjacent files."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
